functions.name: girder_plugin_worker.celery.getCeleryApp
documentation: Lazy loader for the celery app. Reloads anytime the settings are updated.

modules.name: girder_plugin_worker.constants
documentation: The path that will be mounted in docker containers for data IO

functions.name: girder_plugin_worker.utils.validateSettings
documentation:
Handle plugin-specific system settings. Right now we don't do any
validation for the broker or backend URL settings, but we do reinitialize
the celery app object with the new values.

functions.name: girder_plugin_worker.utils.getWorkerApiUrl
documentation:
Return the API base URL to which the worker should callback to
write output information back to the server. This is controlled
via a system setting, and the default is to use the core server
root setting.

functions.name: girder_plugin_worker.utils.girderInputSpec
documentation:
Downstream plugins that are building Girder worker jobs that use Girder IO
should use this to generate the input specs more easily.

```
param resource

The resource document to be downloaded at runtime.

type resource

dict

param resourceType

The resource type to download for the input. Should
be "folder", "item", or "file".

type resourceType

str

param name

The name of the resource to download. If not passed, uses
the "name" field of the resource document.

type name

str or None

param token

The Girder token document or raw token string to use to
authenticate when downloading. Pass  for anonymous downloads.

type token

dict, str, or None

param dataType

The worker  field.

type dataType

str

param dataFormat

The worker  field.

type dataFormat

str

param fetchParent

Whether to fetch the whole parent resource of the
specified resource as a side effect.

type fetchParent

bool
```

functions.name: girder_plugin_worker.utils.girderOutputSpec
documentation:
Downstream plugins that are building worker jobs that use Girder IO
should use this to generate the output specs more easily.

```
param parent

The parent to upload the data into (an item or folder).

type parent

dict

param token

The Girder token document or raw token string to use to
authenticate when uploading.

type token

dict or str

param parentType

The type of the parent object ("item" or "folder").

type parentType

str

param name

Name of the resource to use when uploading. Required if
the output target type is "memory". If the target is "filepath", uses
the basename of the file being uploaded by default.

type name

str or None

param dataType

The worker  field.

type dataType

str

param dataFormat

The worker  field.

type dataFormat

str

param reference

Optional "reference" string to pass back to the server
during the upload. This can be used to attach arbitrary data to this
for tracking purposes, e.g., referring back to related inputs. Bind to
the "data.process" event to hook into the upload and inspect references.

type reference

str
```

functions.name: girder_plugin_worker.utils.jobInfoSpec
documentation:
Build the jobInfo specification for a task to write status and log output
back to a Girder job.

```
param job

The job document representing the worker task.

type job

dict

param token

The token to use. Creates a job token if not passed.

type token

str or dict

param logPrint

Whether standard output from the job should be
```

classes.name: girder_plugin_worker.status.CustomJobStatus
documentation: The custom job status flags for the worker.

functions.name: girder_plugin_worker.event_handlers.validateSettings
documentation:
Handle plugin-specific system settings. Right now we don't do any
validation for the broker or backend URL settings, but we do reinitialize
the celery app object with the new values.

functions.name: girder_plugin_worker.event_handlers.validateJobStatus
documentation: Allow our custom job status values.

functions.name: girder_plugin_worker.event_handlers.validTransitions
documentation: Allow our custom job transitions.

functions.name: girder_plugin_worker.event_handlers.schedule
documentation:
This is bound to the "jobs.schedule" event, and will be triggered any time
a job is scheduled. This handler will process any job that has the
handler field set to "worker_handler".

functions.name: girder_plugin_worker.event_handlers.cancel
documentation:
This is bound to the "jobs.cancel" event, and will be triggered any time
a job is canceled. This handler will process any job that has the
handler field set to "worker_handler".

functions.name: girder_plugin_worker.event_handlers.attachParentJob
documentation: Attach parentJob before a model is saved.

functions.name: girder_plugin_worker.event_handlers.attachJobInfoSpec
documentation: Attach jobInfoSpec after a model is saved.
